value.description: Title text in a particular language

titles.description: Multiple titles to support multiple languages

else.$comment: individualName is required only for a non-publisher role

extentTypeCode.$comment: Indicates whether bounding polygon includes or excludes data: true = inclusion (the default if not specified); false = exclusion

boundingPolygon.$comment: Bounding polygon: an array of one or more polygons

polygon.$comment: An array of at least 4 non-aligned points, with the first and last point coinciding

boundingCoordinates.$comment: Bounding box: approximate geographic position of dataset

altitudeDatumName.description: The identification of the surface used as a reference for altitude measurements.

translations.$comment: case 1: Download link with an (optional) application profile specifying a single file type
case 2: Download link with an application profile that specifies a list of file types, implying an archive
case 3: Query link with an (optional) application profile constrained to the serverType vocabulary
case 4: Other supported types of linked resource

status.description: Reflects the ISO status element within the additionalMetadata block.

formatName.description: The name of the data format (e.g., CSV, GeoTIFF, NetCDF).
